_comment: CalcCorrectGraph saturation curves — 'attribute bonus %' at a given stat level. Values are the % of a weapon's scaling actually realized. See docs/01-damage-formula.md. Anchored to confirmed points (10 STR=11.65%, 15 DEX=19.80%, 20 INT=40%); intermediate points MODELED via monotonic interpolation between the control points below. Swap in exact game-param values here without touching the engine.
_interpolation: piecewise-linear between control points; clamp stat to [1,99]

arcanePhysical._note: Arcane scaling on physical AR (occult/arcane weapons). Physical-like shape.

arcaneStatus._note: Arcane scaling on status buildup (bleed/poison). Rises to ~100% by ARC 45 then flattens.
